> God gives me a second chance to restart my activity.

> It's a French  movie company with €19M of up to date material and a private movie Theatre  in a nice building (on "La Butte Montmartre" area ), has a subsidiary company  in Montréal. The current order book is full !!!!!!!
> 
> Actually, they are chapter 11 and  I can bay it for € 1.5M in Courtroom .
> 
> As usual, in this situation,  I have less then one week to make my proposition . It's really a big chance for me . With that company , I have the top for technical equip ment material to realize all the fashion movies you need .

body_html:
Envoyé de mon iPhone

Début du message transféré :

Expéditeur: laura AZOULAY lauraazoulay@yahoo.fr
Date: 26 juillet 2017 à 15:23:45 UTC+2
Destinataire: Armand Azoulay armandazoulay@yahoo.fr
Objet: TO JEFFREY
Répondre à: laura AZOULAY lauraazoulay@yahoo.fr

Dear Jeffrey ,

God gives me a second chance to restart my activity.

It's a French movie company with €19M of up to date material and a private movie Theatre in a nice building (on "La Butte Montmartre" area ), has a subsidiary company in Montréal. The current order book is full !!!!!!!

Actually, they are chapter 11 and I can bay it for € 1.5M in Courtroom .

As usual, in this situation, I have less then one week to make my proposition . It's really a big chance for me . With that company , I have the top for technical equip ment material to realize all the fashion movies you need .

I accept all your contributions , it's impossible to miss that opportunity.

Friendly Armand

+33 █ █ ██ ██ ███

PS : web site http://filmfactory.fr/
